AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_5.english: Could you take care of the nicotine and caffeine refills?

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_6.korean: 지금은 그냥 재우는 게 좋아 보인다.
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_6.english: It seems best to just put them to sleep for now.

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_8.english: I asked Director Lumberjane to handle it.

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_9.korean: 과연 소장답게 엄청난 일 처리 속도였어!
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_9.english: He lived up to his title—his speed was incredible!

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_12.korean: 다들 왜 그래? 갑자기 날 빤히 보고.
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_12.english: What’s wrong with everyone? Why are you all staring at me all of a sudden?

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_13.korean: 사령관… 설마 그 상태로 우리 대장을 만나러 갈 생각은 아니겠지?
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_13.english: Commander… you’re not thinking of going to meet our captain in that condition, are you?

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_14.korean: 필요한 건 그냥 '남자'가 아니라 '멋. 진. 남. 자'라니까?
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_14.english: We need not just any man, but a truly cool one.

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_16.korean:
물론 사령관님은 있는 그대로도 충분히 멋지다고 생각하지만… 
이 모든 게 영화에서 영감을 얻은 만큼, 특별한 ‘연출’이 필요하다고 생각해요.
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_16.english: Of course, I think you’re already cool as you are, Commander… but since all of this is inspired by movies, I think we need a special “direction.”

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_20.korean: 후후. 사령관, 우리가 멋진 남자로 만들어주지!
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_20.english: Hehe. Commander, we’ll turn you into a cool guy!

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_23.korean: 그럼 저는 칸 대장님께 만나자는 약속을 전달하고 올게요~
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_23.english: Then I’ll go let Captain Khan know we’re meeting.

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_24.korean: 우흐흐, 오늘은 멋진 영상이 잔뜩 나오겠네요~
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_24.english: Hehehe, looks like we’ll have a ton of cool footage today~

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_25.english: (Hmm… the commander calling me out of the blue.)

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_26.english: (Could it be because of our last conversation?)

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_28.english: Is that Kheshig? What’s going on—

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_29.english: Um… excuse me for a moment…!

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_30.korean: 잠깐… 케시크? 왜 갑자기 날 껴안는—
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_30.english: Wait… Kheshig? Why are you suddenly hugging me—

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_32.korean: 좋아! 케시크가 붙잡고 있는 지금, 이대로 연행한다!
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_32.english: Alright! While Kheshig’s holding him, we’ll take him away right now!

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_36.english: You guys!? What are you doing!?

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_37.korean: - 호드 멤버들에게 한바탕 휘말린 끝에, ‘멋진 남자’로 개조(?)당한 나는 약속 장소에 도착했다.
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_37.english: - After getting tangled up with the Horde members and being turned into a “cool guy,” I arrived at the rendezvous.

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_38.korean: - 네온사인이 번져 흐르는 거리 위로, 도시의 심장이 빠르게 뛰는 소리가 들리는 듯했다.
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_38.english: - On the neon‑lit streets, it felt like I could hear the city’s heart pounding.

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_39.korean: - 낯익은 기지의 풍경과 달리 여기, 밤의 도시는 금방이라도 무슨 일이 벌어질 것처럼 어딘가 설레는 얼굴을 하고 있다.
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_39.english: - Unlike the familiar base scenery, the night city here wears an eager expression, as if something is about to happen at any moment.

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_40.korean: - 그 빛의 한가운데, 스포츠카 한 대가 당장이라도 밤을 찢고 달려나갈 듯 도로 위에서 으르렁거리고 있다.
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_40.english: - In the middle of the lights, a sports car growls on the road, ready to tear through the night at a moment’s notice.

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_42.korean: - 화려한 드레스 차림에도 느긋하고, 자신감 있고, 한 치도 흐트러짐 없는 ‘신속의 눈빛’으로
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_42.english: - Even in a glamorous dress, she sits with a relaxed, confident, unflinching “swift gaze.”

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_43.korean: - 차 위에 앉아 자신을 맞이해줄 멋진 남자를 기다리는 피앙세가 있다.
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_43.english: - A fiancée sits on the car, waiting for a handsome man to greet her.

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_44.korean:
…왔군, 사령관.​
예정보다 빠르군. 이 피앙세를 이렇게 서둘러 만나러 올 줄은 몰랐다.
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_44.english: …You’ve arrived, Commander. Earlier than expected. I didn’t think you’d rush to meet my fiancée like this.

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_45.korean:
어떤가?​
사막 먼지를 뒤집어쓰고 뛰어다니던 내가, 이런 드레스 차림으로 차 옆에 서 있으니…​
꽤 낯설지 않나?
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_45.english: How does it feel? Me, who used to run through desert dust, now standing beside a car in a dress… pretty unfamiliar, right?

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_46.korean:
이 차도, 이 드레스도, 이 장소도…​
하나하나 가볍게 준비된 건 아니겠지.​
나를 위해 신경 썼다는 것 정도는, 설명하지 않아도 알 수 있다.
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_46.english: This car, this dress, this place… they weren’t put together lightly. I can tell they were arranged with me in mind, even without you saying it.

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_47.korean:
예전의 나라면, 분명 이렇게 말했을 거다.​
“전장 준비나 더 철저히 하지, 이런 데 힘을 쓸 필요가 있나.”​
…지금은 그 말을, 선뜻 꺼내기 어렵군.
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_47.english: The old me would have said, “Focus more on battlefield prep; why waste effort on this?”… Now it’s hard to bring up those words.

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_48.korean:
그 눈빛을 보고 있으니 말이지.​
사령관이 바란 ‘신속의 칸’의 모습이 이런 거라면…​
그 기대에 맞춰 이렇게 서 있는 이 모습도, 꽤 마음에 드는군.
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_48.english: Seeing that gaze… if this is the “Swift Khan” you wanted… then standing like this, meeting those expectations, I quite like it.

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_49.korean:
주위의 불빛들, 한때는 그저 좌표와 목표물로만 보였다.​
어디에 적이 있고, 어디로 진격해야 할지 계산하는 표시들로 말이지.
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_49.english: The lights around used to be just coordinates and targets—markers showing where the enemy was and where to advance.

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_50.korean:
하지만 오늘만큼은…​
우리가 지켜낸 도시의 야경에 취하고 싶군.​
그 어떤 임무도 브리핑도 없이, 오로지 사령관과 함께 할 수 있는 소중한 밤이니까.
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_50.english: But just for today… I want to get drunk on the night view of the city we defended. No missions or briefings, just a precious night with you, Commander.

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_51.korean:
사령관, 나는 늘 속도와 기동으로 나를 증명하는 데 혈안이었다.​
누구보다 빨리 움직이고, 먼저 도착하는 것…​
그게 내 역할이라고 믿었지.
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_51.english: Commander, I've always been obsessed with proving myself through speed and maneuverability—moving faster than anyone else, arriving first. I believed that was my role.

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_52.korean:
하지만 느긋하게 멈춰 서서, 그대와 나란히 같은 풍경을 보는 것도…​
생각이상으로 마음이 편안하더군.​
뒤쳐지는 게 아니라, 방법이 바뀐 것뿐이겠지.
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_52.english: But stopping leisurely and watching the same scenery beside you… turned out to be more comforting than I expected. It's not that I'm falling behind; it's just a different approach.

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_53.korean:
후후, 사령관. 그렇게 붙잡지 않아도 이 피앙세는 도망가지 않는다.​
전장에서도, 이 자리에서도... 이미 그대 곁에 서는 법을 몸이 기억하고 있으니까.
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_53.english: Hehe, Commander. You don't have to cling to me—this fiancée won't run away. Whether on the battlefield or right here, my body already knows how to stand by your side.

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_54.korean: 그러니 오늘 이 시간은, 처음부터 끝까지 사령관만을 위해 비워 둔 전용 직선도로라고 생각하면 된다.
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_54.english: So think of today as a private straight road, cleared from start to finish just for you.

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_55.korean:
언젠가 진짜로 평화가 찾아온다면,​
그때도 그대 옆에 서서, 함께 야경을 바라보고 싶다.​
사령관과 부하의 관계가 아니라… 그대의 피앙세로서 말이다.
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_55.english: If true peace ever comes, I want to stand by your side then too, watching the night view together—not as commander and subordinate, but as your fiancée.

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_56.korean:
전장에선 언제나 앞만 보고 달렸지만…​
지금 이 순간만큼은, 그대 곁에 이렇게 서 있을 수 있다는 사실만으로도 충분하군.
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_56.english: On the battlefield I always charged forward without looking back… but in this moment, simply being able to stand beside you is enough.

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_57.korean:
그러니 이 밤을 잘 기억해 둬라, 사령관.​
이 차와 야경, 그리고 그대 곁에 이렇게 서 있는 피앙세까지…​
오늘의 나는, 처음부터 끝까지 그대를 위해 멈춰 서 있을테니까.​
원하는 만큼 마음껏 속력을 내라, 사령관.
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_57.english: So remember this night, Commander—the car, the night view, and the fiancée standing beside you. Today, I'll stay still for you from beginning to end. Go as fast as you like, Commander.

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_58.korean: - 다음 날, 어젯밤에 너무 달렸던 탓인지 뻐근한 몸을 이끌고 나오다가 우연히 칸과 마주쳤다.
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_58.english: —The next day, my body still sore from last night's sprint, I was dragging myself around when I ran into Khan.

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_60.english: We were speeding yesterday… how are you feeling?

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_61.korean: 후후. 마음껏 속력을 내라고 말한 건 내 쪽이다.
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_61.english: Hehe. I'm the one who told you to go as fast as you want.

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_62.korean: 이 정도는 문제 없으니 걱정하지 않아도 된다.
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_62.english: This level is no problem, so don't worry.

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_64.english: They all said they're taking the day off today.

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_65.korean: 나중에 따로 고맙다는 말을 전하려고 한다.
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_65.english: I'll make sure to thank them properly later.

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_66.korean: 물론… 그것과는 별개로, 강제로 날 끌고 간 건 따끔하게 한 마디 할 생각이지만.
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_66.english: Of course… aside from that, I do plan to give them a firm word for dragging me along by force.

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_71.korean: 이제 우리의 영화가 절찬리 막을 내렸으니 네 소감을 들어보고 싶어.
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_71.english: Now that our little “movie” has come to a spectacular close, I’d love to hear your thoughts.

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_72.korean: 칸은 호드 녀석들과 내가 준비한 것들 중에… 정말 원하는 게 있었어?
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_72.english: Khan, among everything the Horde and I prepared… was there something you truly wanted?

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_73.korean: 흠? 무슨 뜻이지? 이 모든 게 사령관 홀로 준비한 게 아니었나?
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_73.english: Huh? What do you mean? Didn't you prepare all of this yourself, Commander?

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_74.english: Seems I didn’t explain well enough… actually—

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_75.english: …I definitely said that after watching the movie back then.

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_76.korean: 후후. 그래서 이런 준비를 한 거였나.
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_76.english: Hehe. So that’s why you put together all this.

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_77.korean: 결론부터 말하자면, 그때 내가 '멋지다'라고 한 이유는 드레스나 스포츠카 때문이 아니다.
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_77.english: To cut to the chase, the reason I called it “cool” back then wasn’t because of the dress or the sports car.

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_78.korean: 그럼 어떤 부분이 칸에게 멋졌던 거야?
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_78.english: Then what part did you think was cool about Khan?

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_80.english: Yeah. I’d like you to tell me.

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_82.korean: 그 마지막 장면에서… 두 사람이 보여준 모습이 멋지다고 생각했다.
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_82.english: In that final scene… I thought the way the two of them acted was cool.

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_83.korean: 두 사람이면... 영화 속 남주인공이랑 여주인공?
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_83.english: Two people… the male and female leads of the movie?

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_85.korean: 처음에는 호흡도 맞지 않고, 서로 계속 어긋나던 두 사람이었지.
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_85.english: At first they were out of sync, constantly missing each other.

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_86.korean: 그런데 결국 마지막에는… 완벽한 팀플레이로 같은 속도로 나아가더군.
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_86.english: But in the end… they moved forward together with perfect teamwork, at the same speed.

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_88.korean: 어쩌면… 나는 그 주인공들처럼 되고 싶었던 걸지도 모르겠군.
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_88.english: Maybe… I wanted to be like those protagonists after all.

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_90.english: No… you’ve already done it, haven’t you?

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_91.korean: 너와 같은 속도로 나아갈 사람이라면, 이렇게 바로 옆에 있으니까.
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_91.english: If someone can keep pace with you, they’ll be right here beside you.

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_92.korean: 나뿐만 아니라… 모두가 칸과 함께 나아갈 거야.
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_92.english: Not just me… everyone will move forward with you, Khan.

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_94.english: Hehe, indeed. Just as you said, Commander.

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_95.korean: 늘 혼자 전장을 누비던 고독한 늑대가…
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_95.english: The lone wolf who always roamed the battlefield alone…

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_96.korean: 어느새 원하던 걸 손에 쥔 셈인가.
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_96.english: Somehow, I’ve ended up holding what I’ve always wanted.

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_97.english: Thank you, Commander, for standing by my side…

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_98.english: I will always be your fiancée,

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_99.english: moving forward at the same speed as you.
